routes.title: About — TopRates.ca · Insurance, in plain English
routes.description: TopRates.ca is operated by Webhub4u Inc. Life insurance content is reviewed by LLQP-licensed advisors at KLC Group Canada Inc., an independent Canadian insurance brokerage. Full brokerage services launch summer 2027.

routes.title: Ontario Auto Insurance 2026: Reform & GTA Guide — TopRates.ca
routes.description: Understand Ontario auto insurance in 2026: the July 1 reform making accident benefits optional, why GTA drivers pay more, and legitimate ways to lower your rate. Plain-English education from TopRates.ca.

routes.title: Ontario Auto Insurance Reform 2026: What's Changing on July 1 | TopRates.ca
routes.description: Ontario Regulation 383/24 amends the Statutory Accident Benefits Schedule (SABS) on July 1, 2026. We explain what's changing, what remains mandatory, and what becomes optional — sourced from FSRA, the regulation itself, and RIBO.
routes.h1Text: Ontario auto insurance reform: what's changing on July 1, 2026
